attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT DEAL.BATCH_ID, DEAL.OPTY_NUMBER, 
COALESCE(DEAL.DEAL_OBJECT_ID, -999),
COALESCE(DEAL.PRODUCT_FAMILY, 'UNKNOWN'), 
COALESCE(DEAL.PF_DISCOUNT_RULE_ID,-999), 
COALESCE(DEAL.PF_DISCOUNT_BAND, 'UNKNOWN'), DEAL.CREATED_ON, DEAL.LAST_RUN_DATE, DEAL.DEAL_COMPONENT, DEAL.PR_SER_CATEGORY, DEAL.FINAL_COMPONENT_BAND, DEAL.STRINGENT_PF, DEAL.DEAL_APPROVAL_BAND, DEAL.EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL, DEAL.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE, DEAL.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE, DEAL.PF_APPROVAL_RULE_ID, DEAL.PF_APPROVAL_BAND, DEAL.CREATE_DATETIME, DEAL.ACTION_CODE 
FROM
 $$STGDB.st_cq_deal_pf_band_rpt DEAL
QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER ( ) OVER ( PARTITION BY  DEAL_OBJECT_ID,PRODUCT_FAMILY,PF_DISCOUNT_RULE_ID,PF_DISCOUNT_BAND
ORDER	BY CREATED_ON DESC ) = 1

SELECT WBAND.BATCH_ID, WBAND.OPTY_NUMBER, WBAND.DEAL_OBJECT_ID, WBAND.PRODUCT_FAMILY, WBAND.PF_DISCOUNT_RULE_ID, WBAND.PF_DISCOUNT_BAND, WBAND.CREATED_ON, WBAND.LAST_RUN_DATE, WBAND.DEAL_COMPONENT, WBAND.PR_SER_CATEGORY, WBAND.FINAL_COMPONENT_BAND, WBAND.STRINGENT_PF, WBAND.DEAL_APPROVAL_BAND, WBAND.EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL, WBAND.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE, WBAND.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE, WBAND.PF_APPROVAL_RULE_ID, WBAND.PF_APPROVAL_BAND, WBAND.CREATE_DATETIME, WBAND.ACTION_CODE,   'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_CQ_DEAL_PF_BAND_RPT WBAND
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL  DEALS
where   WBAND.DEAL_OBJECT_ID=DEALS.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT)

SELECT 
NDEAL.BK_DEAL_ID,
COALESCE(DEAL.PRODUCT_FAMILY, 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SRC_RPTD_PRDT_FAMILY_NAME , 
COALESCE(DEAL.PF_DISCOUNT_BAND, 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_DISCOUNT_BAND_CD, 
COALESCE(DEAL.PF_DISCOUNT_RULE_ID, -999) AS BK_SRC_RPTD_PF_DSCNRULEID_INT,
COALESCE(NFAMILY.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_DV_PRDT_FAMILY_ID , 
COALESCE(DEAL.PF_APPROVAL_BAND,'UNKNOWN') AS PF_APPROVAL_BAND_CD, 
COALESCE(DEAL.DEAL_APPROVAL_BAND,'UNKNOWN') AS FINAL_APPROVAL_BAND_CD, 
COALESCE(DEAL.PF_APPROVAL_RULE_ID,0) AS SRC_RPTD_PF_APPRVL_RULE_ID_INT, 
COALESCE(DEAL.CREATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS CREATED_ON_DTM,
COALESCE(CAST(DEAL.CREATED_ON AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DV_CREATED_ON_DT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
DEAL.ACTION_CODE,
'I' DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT
DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
PRODUCT_FAMILY ,
PF_DISCOUNT_BAND,
PF_DISCOUNT_RULE_ID,
PF_APPROVAL_BAND,
DEAL_APPROVAL_BAND, 
PF_APPROVAL_RULE_ID,
CREATED_ON,
ACTION_CODE
FROM
$$STGDB.wi_cq_deal_pf_band_rpt WBAND
UNION ALL
SELECT
DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
PRODUCT_FAMILY, 
PF_DISCOUNT_BAND,
PF_DISCOUNT_RULE_ID,
PF_APPROVAL_BAND,
DEAL_APPROVAL_BAND, 
PF_APPROVAL_RULE_ID,
CREATED_ON,
ACTION_CODE
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.ex_cq_deal_pf_band_rpt EBAND) DEAL
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL NDEAL 
ON DEAL.DEAL_OBJECT_ID=NDEAL.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NFAMILY
ON NFAMILY.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=DEAL.PRODUCT_FAMILY
